name: Realm-Sealing Grand Array
description: Wang Lin becomes Lord of the Sealed Realm, inheriting its karma and protection.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Realm-Sealing Grand Array. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
